It’s really interesting. As NAND market conditions have improved dramatically — with Q1 NAND operating profit reaching roughly five times last year’s total — even Samsung is now said to be considering expanding NAND capacity.

data.title: Scorpio Tankers Inc. Announces Pricing of Convertible Senior Notes due 2031 and Concurrent Stock Repurchase
data.description: Scorpio Tankers Inc. (NYSE: STNG) revealed today that it has priced a private offering of $325 million in 1.75% convertible senior notes due 2031, which is an increase from the initially announced $300 million. The Notes are solely available to qualified institutional buyers under Rule 144A of the Securities Act of 1933. Additionally, the Company has given the initial purchasers the option to acquire up to an extra $50 million in Notes within a 13-day period from the issuance date.

data.title: REJURAN Cosmetics Debuts at Sephora U.S. with Sold-Out LA Pop-Up
data.description: The LA activation organized by REJURAN Cosmetics garnered over 5,000 attendees and saw a surge in interest for its hero products. The event took place in Los Angeles from March 27 to 29, serving as the brand's official introduction at Sephora U.S. The successful debut highlighted the growing demand for the cosmetics line.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Jump, Oil Prices Dive On Trump-Iran Cease-Fire; What To Do Now
data.description: Futures for the Dow Jones Industrial Average saw a significant increase, while there was a notable decline in oil prices. President Trump has made a decision to suspend attacks on Iran for a period of two weeks. In return, there are reports indicating that Iran has agreed to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. This development has sparked various considerations for investors and traders on the market.

data.title: Vistance Networks Board Approves Special Distribution
data.description: Vistance Networks (NASDAQ: VISN), a global provider of intelligent network solutions based in Richardson, Texas, has declared a special cash distribution of $10.00 per share. The distribution will be payable on April 27, 2026, to holders of record of its common stock as of April 17, 2026. The Company's Board of Directors announced this decision, and the payment will be funded using cash on hand, including proceeds received in connection with certain transactions.
